FlavourText.original:
The Unblinking Eye did not cower and wail.
They stood against the end.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
凝望之眼绝不会退缩，
他们傲立至最后一刻。
FlavourText.zh_tw:
無光之眼未曾退縮和哀泣。
他們挺身對抗終結。
